import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut xs: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    xs = list.push(xs, v)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len()
  mut found = -1
  while lo < hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    let m = match xs.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if m == target
      found = mid
      lo = hi
    else if m < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid
    end
  end

  if found >= 0
    print("index=#{found}")
  else
    print("not_found")
  end
  Ok(())
end
